headlines.description: Exequiel Palacios drilled in a second half stoppage-time goal to give Bayer Leverkusen a dramatic 1-0 win at Augsburg on Saturday and keep them top of the Bundesliga with a four-point advantage.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen score late to beat Augsburg 1-0

video.headline: Palacios' last minute winner sparks wild Leverkusen celebrations

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Palacios' last minute winner sparks wild Leverkusen celebrations) 2024/01/13 ESHEET

events.name: 1. FC Union Berlin at SC Freiburg

headlines.description: Fifth-placed Borussia Dortmund eased past bottom side Darmstadt 98 3-0 away on Saturday for a winning start to the new year as Jadon Sancho set up one goal on his return for the Ruhr valley club following his loan move from Manchester United.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sancho returns with assist in big Dortmund win

video.headline: Sancho sets up Reus in his return to Borussia Dortmund

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Sancho finds Reus for Dortmund's 2nd goal) 2024/01/13 ESHEET
